title: Kinds of succession
doc_html:
Art. 873. Kinds of succession

           There are two kinds of succession: testate and intestate.

           Acts 1981, No. 919, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1982.
doc_text:
Art. 873.  Kinds of succession
There are two kinds of succession: testate and intestate.
Acts 1981, No. 919, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1982.
